rationale: The citing paper references Jap et al. (2013) only in grouped citations, mainly as broad background on opportunism/relationship dynamics and as part of an "emergent body" of related work. It does not engage the specific low-stakes opportunism mechanism in detail, nor does it use the cited paper to build a distinct hypothesis, operationalization, or empirical test. The paper's core framework and tests are developed from social exchange and power-solidarity arguments using other central sources.
